name: Symbiotic and Trapper (ModernAU)
description:
this is the modern version hope yall had a happy Halloween, i am experimenting with the modern AU see how it would go... i did have to butcher the template so if it looks alot less its becuase i edited and get rid of the rainworld part and yes symbiotic does not have the special kind of rot anymore she is just normal. this is a experiment if there is bugs let me know and if theres things you want me to add please tell me.

edit: i forgot to mention i will be adding to this... i just kinda wanted this to be out sooner since i promised a 8 starting message one.

Love yourself

scugtism
